subcodes.first_line: O thou Martyr, son of the Martyr! Thou didst complain of the paucity of replies and the infrequency of letters. I swear by the Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شهید ابن الشهید شکایت از قلت ارسال جواب و صدور خطاب فرموده بودید قسم بجمال
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @firmness in the Covenant
